description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade features a combination of large windows, a prominent garage door, and a main entrance with a small overhang. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or concrete, with dark accents on the roof and window frames. The property includes a paved driveway, a small landscaped area with trees and shrubs, and a low stone wall bordering the front yard. The side and rear elevations are more minimal, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding green lawn.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a garage, and landscaped front yard, finished in light and dark materials. The design is clean and geometric, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, large windows, paved driveway, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, flat roof, and minimal window openings along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly solid wall, limited window openings, and a large expanse of green lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the flat roof, minimal windows, and the stone-bordered front yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and minimal side windows
